CustomField.formula: IF( (ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'Apex') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'aura') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'lwc') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'VisualForce') || ISPICKVAL(cfp_implementationtype__c, 'dataweave')), IF(cfp_is_API_Call__c, 2, 1), 0 )
CustomField.label: isProCode
